Identity.Name: StingMaintenanceFrequencies
Identity.Definition: SFG20-aligned maintenance frequency codes for COBie / FM handover. Used by Pset_StingFM, IoT maintenance scheduling, COBie Job templates, and Planscape MIM PPM schedules. Each frequency carries a default interval; OnFailure and OnCondition trigger reactively rather than on a calendar.

Governance.StandardsBasis: SFG20 maintenance frequency conventions; BS 8210:2020 facilities management; STING COBIE_JOB_TEMPLATES.csv

Value.Definition: Daily — every 24 hours. Critical-care medical equipment, fire alarm panel checks.
Weekly — every 7 days. Emergency generator runs, sprinkler pump tests, augmented-care water outlet flushing.
Monthly — every 28-31 days. Standard PPM cadence for most building services.
Quarterly — every 90-92 days. HVAC filter changes, valve exercises.
Semi-annual — every 6 months. Fan coil descaling, water tank inspections.
Annual — every 12 months. Statutory inspections (lifts, pressure systems, electrical PAT, fixed-wiring 5-year sample).
Biennial — every 24 months. Cooling tower deep clean, dental amalgam separator change.
Five-yearly — every 60 months. BS 7671 fixed-wiring full PIR, lightning protection inspection.
Ten-yearly — every 120 months. Pressure vessel hydraulic retest, lift major overhaul.
On failure — reactive maintenance, no calendar interval. Component runs to failure then replaced.
On condition — triggered by sensor reading or inspection finding crossing a threshold. Drives predictive-maintenance flows.
